mapper.select: SELECT card_id as cardId, member_id as memberId, card_token as cardToken, masked_card_number as maskedCardNumber, card_status as cardStatus, monthly_limit as monthlyLimit, current_usage as currentUsage, issued_date as issuedDate, expiry_date as expiryDate, is_deleted as isDeleted, created_at as createdAt FROM Cards WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT card_id as cardId, member_id as memberId, card_token as cardToken, masked_card_number as maskedCardNumber, card_status as cardStatus, monthly_limit as monthlyLimit, current_usage as currentUsage, issued_date as issuedDate, expiry_date as expiryDate, is_deleted as isDeleted, created_at as createdAt FROM Cards WHERE card_id = #{cardId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Cards (member_id, card_token, masked_card_number, card_status, monthly_limit, current_usage, issued_date, expiry_date) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{cardToken}, #{maskedCardNumber}, #{cardStatus}, #{monthlyLimit}, #{currentUsage}, #{issuedDate}, #{expiryDate})
